prerequisites: A RevenueCat account with an active project (sign in at the RevenueCat dashboard).
A secret API key for the project, created under Project Settings > API Keys. The v1 REST API requires a secret key (prefixed sk_), not a public/SDK key.
A start date value to bound the initial sync window (the start_date config field is required).

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with RevenueCat's v1 REST API using a secret API key supplied in the api_key field. The key is sent as an HTTP bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>) against the base URL https://api.revenuecat.com/v1. Use a project secret key (sk_ prefix) created in the dashboard; public/SDK keys are not sufficient for server-side REST calls.

setupSteps.title: Create a secret API key in RevenueCat
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the RevenueCat dashboard and open Project Settings > API Keys for the project you want to sync. Create or copy a secret API key (prefixed sk_). Keep this key confidential; it should only be stored on your servers and never embedded in client-side code.

setupSteps.title: Provide the api_key
setupSteps.body: Set the connector's api_key field to the secret API key. It is sent as an Authorization: Bearer header on requests to https://api.revenuecat.com/v1.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which data should be pulled. This bounds the initial extraction window for the source.
